postReview.title: Croatia 1-1 Italy: Modric makes Euros history but last-gasp stunner sends Azzurri through
postReview.description: Mattia Zaccagni was Italy's hero as the European champions pegged back Croatia to ensure they progressed into the last 16 at Euro 2024.
